title: hydrangea hydrangeoides var. taquetii
intro: Hydrangea hydrangeoides var. taquetii, also known as the Limelight Hydrangea, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family and is native to East Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Hydrangea hydrangeoides var. taquetii include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations often involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant in a tincture or salve to apply topically for wound healing and skin issues.
